name: Single Responsibility Principle
summary: A class should have only one reason to change.

name: Open-Closed Principle
summary: Software entities should be open for extension but closed for modification.

name: Liskov Substitution Principle
summary: Subtypes must be substitutable for their base types.

name: God Object
summary: A class that knows too much or does too much.

name: Feature Envy
summary: A method that seems more interested in a class other than the one it belongs to.
